line: GROVE_RESULT: F13 daemon health wiring resumed from checkpoint and landed. `DaemonRuntime::doctor_report()` now uses live runtime `BrainStore` attention inputs instead of synthetic namespace heatmap placeholders, while keeping prewarm advisory only.

line: - In current daemon behavior, encode activity is reflected in attention heatmaps immediately, while recall count in this test path remains zero; tests should assert the actual surfaced contract, not the intended future model.

line: - Limited scope to the smallest safe checkpointed step: live daemon health wiring plus parity assertions, without broad cache/prewarm actuation changes.

line: - The daemon crate had unrelated pre-existing compile/test drift in other paths during intermediate runs (`encode_memory` callsites / trait derives / RPC pattern shape); final validation used the daemon library build plus the two targeted parity tests relevant to this slice.
